ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Instant of rental */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Season ID */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of rental */,
  "mnth" INTEGER /* Month of rental */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Hour of rental */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ..., 6 = Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day indicator (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1 = Clear, 2 = Misty, 3 = Light Snow) */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Count of bikes rented */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Station ID where the bike was rented */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Bike ID used in the rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Rental status (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Instant of weather record */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature (Celsius) */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature (Celsius) */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed (m/s) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the weather record */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (mm) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, station_manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the station manager */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Station ID managed by the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the station */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager stopped managing the station (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_managers_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  "price_per_hour" REAL /* Price per hour for renting the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_rental_details" (
  "rental_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental detail */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Rental ID */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Bike type ID */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Casual rental indicator (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Registered rental indicator (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Station ID where the rental started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Station ID where the rental ended */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled in the rental (km) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_details_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_details_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_details_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_details_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
